title: Handle Go parser failures
description: Go parser failures indicate syntax errors or unsupported language constructs that prevent proper code analysis. These failures can hide other code quality issues and should be resolved to ensure comprehensive static analysis coverage.
recommendation: Fix syntax errors and ensure code follows supported Go language specifications.

noncompliant.description: Syntax errors and malformed code prevent the Go parser from analyzing the code properly.

compliant.description: Proper Go syntax ensures the parser can analyze the code and detect other quality issues.
